programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to get the Olympic Games to come to Springfield, but Bart ruins her efforts with an ill-judged stand-up routine. As punishment, he is forced to undertake community service at Grampa's retirement home, where he discovers the OAPs are desperate to feel young again

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren is suspicious of Sienna and Brody, while Maxine encourages Damon to follow his heart, and Kurt makes his intentions very clear with a proposition for his oldest friends

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Britain's service industry is battling for customers, but the public need to be convinced the big names are doing all they can to limit risk to exposure. Many hotel chains, transport companies, restaurants and pubs are making big promises of 'deep cleans' and ''enhanced hygiene practices', but with the resurgence of Covid-19, Morland Sanders puts them to test and asks just how safe is it when we go out. Government public health guidance says regular cleaning of surfaces plays a vital role in limiting the transmission of Covid-19 in public settings. In a national experiment, the programme tests the cleanliness of the surfaces people might encounter on a commute, or going for a drink, a meal or a mini staycation? It also examines emerging research concerning airborne transmission of Covid, as well as meeting people whose wellbeing is reliant on the hygiene standards of the service industry

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton uncovers the truth behind some of Britain's most shocking food headlines, meeting the case studies behind the stories as well as exploring the science, conducting experiments and questioning those in control. She begins by investigating the world of severe food allergies, enlisting the help of a team of sufferers to report undercover at a host of different London eateries to see how they are treated

programme.title: President Trump: Tweets from the White House
programme.desc: Donald Trump has tweeted tens of thousands of times since becoming US president, giving the American people unique access to his innermost, unedited thoughts, and giving him access to his base without the interference of the traditional media. This programme looks at the impact on US politics of his use of Twitter, and whether they have caused problems and controversies, or, seemingly, solved intractable foreign policy problems

programme.title: Adult Material
programme.desc: Stella goes head to head with Jolene's former employers as her day in court arrives and she is finally forced to confront her past, while Carroll attempts to salvage his friendship with Jolene as loyalties are ruptured. Meanwhile, when the lost tape and her test results go public, Amy is forced to leave porn and begins escorting

programme.title: Random Acts

programme.title: Taskmaster

Highlights include Johnny Vegas yelling from a tall chair, Katherine Parkinson forgetting how balloons work and Richard Herring flailing about in a dinghy. It remains to be seen what Daisy May Cooper and Mawaan Rizan will be doing - but it's unlikely to be dignified

programme.title: The Bridge

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: The family struggles through two devastating winter storms, during which 100mph winds batter the farm and more than a month's worth of rainfall occurs in the space of just 24 hours. While Clive and Reuben brave the elements to keep the animals fed, Amanda can do nothing to stop the livestock trailer being washed away downstream in a flood. Once the first wave of extreme weather is over, they face a heavy snowfall. On the plus side, this new turn in the conditions gives Miles the chance to practice snowboarding

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: The family tackles life in lockdown, just as lambing season gets into full swing. Violet and Clemmy help to deliver some new additions to the flock, while Sydney heads out onto the moors on a mission to save a vulnerable newborn lamb. Amanda seeks to document their daily lives under lockdown with a video diary, enlisting the kids as camera crew - which results in an unusual toddlers' eye view of the farm. As the temperature rises in the spring, the family takes advantage of the good conditions to go horse riding and wild swimming

programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor travels through Finland, Sweden and Denmark, visiting Helsinki on Independence Day and soon finding himself on the main street face-to-face with Finland's president. Tony rides the Arctic Circle Train south to the mining town of Kiruna on the edge of Swedish Lapland, then boards the sleeper train to Stockholm and on to the Danish capital Copenhagen

programme.title: The Queen Mother
programme.desc: Documentary exploring pivotal moments in the queen mother's life, starting with the tumultuous events of 1936. She began the year as Duchess of York, but following the abdication of her brother-in-law Edward VIII, her husband George was forced to take on the throne, leaving her unexpectedly thrust into the role of queen and a vital source of support for the unprepared new monarch

programme.title: The Story of the Songs
programme.desc: The stories behind three singles of the singles that made the singer a global superstar. The programme examines 1996 breakthrough ballad Because You Loved Me, operatic rock track It's All Coming Back to Me Now with its accompanying Gothic music video, and her 2003 cover of I Drove All Night, which drew inspiration from Swedish dance music

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain with Chris Tarrant
programme.desc: The broadcaster examines the role of the railways during the two global conflicts of the 20th century, keeping vital supply lines open and transporting troops to and from the front. In the First World War, railway works were converted into munitions factories and women were employed for these dangerous jobs and their heroic efforts helped win them the vote, while in the Second World War, they were vital in organising the evacuation of a million children and offered underground shelters from air raids

programme.title: City Life to Country Life
programme.desc: A profile of the McWhinneys, whose Scottish island has been their ancestral home since the 15th century. The lively family of five are the only occupants of Dry Isle - a tidal island, connected to the land by a floating footbridge. Their ancestors owned and worked from this island for centuries. To keep up with the demands of modern life, dad Ian and mum Jess have had to diversify and make the most of the landscape around them

CEO Angus is back in New York City. After the success of the company's first store in Manhattan, a second is due to open close to Central Park. But there's a problem. programme.title: ABBA: In Their Own Words
programme.desc: A celebration of the Swedish supergroup. Original interviews, rare archive footage and a lot of music, re-tells the story of one of the most successful pop groups of all time. Contributors include original studio engineer Michael Tretow, costume designer Owe Sandström, singer-songwriter Neil Sedaka, singers Donny Osmond and Barbara Dickson, Pete Waterman, Paul Gambaccini, tour manager Thomas Johansson and lyricist Tim Rice. Plus, Agnetha Fältskog, Anni-Frid Lyngstad, Björn Ulvaeus and Benny Andersson provide surprising insights

programme.title: ABBA: Live in Concert
programme.desc: A recording of the Swedish band in concert during their six-night residency at London's Wembley Arena in November 1979. programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of neighbourly conflicts, featuring a dispute between two retired men about a new driveway, which resulted in the pair fighting in the street in the Tayside town of Kinross. The Webbs' peace in rural Plymouth was shattered when a new family moved in a few doors away, and a row about parking erupted into a full-blown punch-up. Meanwhile, Rita Grootendorst claims to have been the victim of a land grab by her next-door neighbours, although she is the one who has been arrested for assault and criminal damage over a drainpipe

But when it seems that Stephanie's worst fears are realised and her little girl is abducted, she learns something about the kidnapper's intentions that throws her whole world on its head. Thriller, starring Sarah Lind and Robb Derringer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey and Ross date the same girl, while Monica fights tooth and nail with a fellow bride-to-be for a special wedding dress and the right to hire Chandler's favourite band for the ceremony. David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Building the Ultimate
programme.desc: A look at the engineering secrets of the Antonov 124 Ruslan cargo aircraft, revealing how it transports the bulkiest, heaviest freight thousands of miles to any point on the planet. From its mega-tough skeleton forged from strong but super-light metal, to its four thrust-boosting engines, the programme reveals the technologies that make it the ultimate cargo plane

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The pursuit of a lights-out and dangerous teenage car thief, who is rallying around the roads of Wakefield at 90 miles an hour, is priority number one. One step ahead are interceptors Adie and Sophie, who are lying in wait ready to burst the driver's bubble, and his tyres, with a stinger. In Seacroft, Chris and Chris go into overdrive when a high-performance motor tries to give them the slip and, after cornering a dodgy Audi, the team are forced to stretch their legs to collar the driver

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The return of the documentary going behind the scenes at the London station. It is the height of summer and staff and passengers on the Western network are feeling the heat, with Network Rail staff positioned at key points to monitor the track - which can reach temperatures up to 20C higher than the air temperature

programme.title: London Has Fallen (2016)
programme.desc: World leaders gather in London for the funeral of the British Prime Minister, unaware they have been led into a trap. A terrorist plans to kill them all, and devastate the city, and the only people in a position to stop him are the President of the United States and the indomitable head of his secret service. Action thriller sequel to Olympus Has Fallen, starring Gerard Butler, Aaron Eckhart and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: House Doctor

The kitchen is transformed into the hub of family life and a lounge is converted into a dining room, while unfortunate colour clashes are toned down

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Rob Bell reveals the story of how the Clifton Suspension Bridge was built over the Avon gorge at Bristol

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The singer sails the Danube on one of the most luxurious ships of its type, as she makes her first foray into the realms of the river cruise. Beginning in Budapest, Jane heads to the Szechenyi Baths, where she indulges in a game of chess. Afterwards, a visit to the Second World War memorial Shoes on the Danube Bank, leaves her in tears. Heading onwards to Vienna, the presenter is all set to meet a real-life princess. Then, after a waltz and a wurst, Jane makes her way to her final stop of Passau, southern Bavaria, to view its charming architecture

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie (2000)
programme.desc: The lucky little tots embark on a trip to a French theme park - but while the rest of the gang are intent on enjoying themselves, Chuckie is distracted by his wish for a new mum. He sets his sights on the owner of the amusement park as a prospective partner for his single dad. Animated adventure, with the voices of Christine Cavanaugh, Elizabeth Daily, Cheryl Chase, Kath Soucie and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner

programme.title: The Perfect Catch (2005)
programme.desc: Unlikely couple Ben and Lindsey meet and fall in love over the winter. When summer brings a new baseball season, Lindsey discovers Ben's devotion to the Boston Red Sox baseball team knows no bounds - and suspects she will always come second. The Farrelly brothers' romantic comedy, starring Jimmy Fallon and Drew Barrymore, inspired by Nick Hornby's football-themed novel Fever Pitch, but with America's favourite sport replacing Britain's

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle (2016)
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 3 (2015)
programme.desc: Gifted psychic Elise Rainier reluctantly agrees to use her ability to contact the dead in order to help a teenage girl who has been targeted by a dangerous supernatural entity. Horror prequel, starring Dermot Mulroney, Stefanie Scott and Lin Shaye

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto

programme.title: The Thirty-Nine Steps (1978)
programme.desc: An innocent man is informed of a devious plan to start the First World War by murdering a foreign minister. Almost immediately, he is framed for murder and embarks on a perilous cross-country trek to prove his innocence, pursued by both the police and ruthless spies. Thriller - the third film adaptation of John Buchan's novel - starring Robert Powell, Karen Dotrice, John Mills and George Baker

programme.title: Two by Two (2015)
programme.desc: Two strange creatures and their children are barred from getting on board Noah's Ark, but manage to sneak in. When the kids fall overboard, they face a struggle for survival as the flood waters rise, while their distraught parents must work together to rescue them. Animated adventure, with the voices of Tara Flynn and Dermot Magennis

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2010)
programme.desc: A clumsy Viking boy longs to become a mighty dragon slayer and protect his village from the fearsome flying lizards, but his father thinks he is not up to the task. However, when he sets out to prove his worth, he ends up befriending a dragon, and realises his people may have misjudged the creatures. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jay Baruchel and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence (2016)
programme.desc: Two decades have passed since Earth was saved from an extraterrestrial invasion, and in the years since, the aliens' salvaged technology has been used to transform the world. However, it may not be enough to save the human race when a second, even deadlier attack begins. Sci-fi adventure, starring Jeff Goldblum, Liam Hemsworth and Bill Pullman

programme.title: Babylon AD (2008)
programme.desc: A mercenary in a post-apocalyptic future accepts a job escorting a mysterious girl and the nun protecting her from Russia to New York. Along the way, she exhibits strange powers that could hold the key to mankind's salvation - but various factions are plotting to put her gifts to their own use. Sci-fi adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Michelle Yeoh, Melanie Thierry, Gerard Depardieu and Charlotte Rampling

programme.title: Filth (2013)
programme.desc: A corrupt policeman with a cocaine habit plans to advance his own career by turning colleagues against each other, while also desperately hoping to persuade his ex-wife to take him back. He rapidly loses his grip on reality as the drug use spirals out of control and his web of lies grows increasingly complex. Black comedy, starring James McAvoy, Imogen Poots, Jamie Bell and Jim Broadbent

programme.title: Random
programme.desc: Debbie Tucker Green's adaptation of her play about a family whose ordinary day is shattered by a single event. A couple and their two children go about their morning routines, but when the son is late for school it leads to a tragic event that will leave them devastated. The story unfolds in a stark studio setting, where Nadine Marshall (reprising her role from the stage production) acts out the inner thoughts of each character, and in the real world, where she and three other actors play the four family members. Also starring Daniel Kaluuya, Jay Byrd and Louis Mahoney

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Three deaf people discuss how joining deaf sports teams changed their lives

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: The Last Frontier (1955)
programme.desc: A backwoods trapper signs up as a cavalry scout at a fort manned by inexperienced soldiers, where he falls in love with a colonel's wife. On taking over command of the garrison, the officer plans to lead his men in a reckless attack on a hostile Indian tribe - and it is down to the frontiersman to save his comrades from a massacre. Western, starring Victor Mature, Robert Preston and Anne Bancroft

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning

programme.title: A Quiet Place (2018)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with hypersensitive hearing. Horror, starring Emily Blunt and John Krasinski, who also directed

programme.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after events of the first film, in a secluded Ohio trailer park, three masked strangers, Dollface, Pin-Up Girl, and the Man in the Mask, terrorise a family. Slasher horror sequel, starring Bailee Madison, Lewis Pullman and Christina Hendricks

programme.title: The Devil's Doorway (2018)
programme.desc: In the autumn of 1960, Father Thomas Riley and Father John Thornton are sent by the Vatican to investigate a miraculous event in an Irish home for 'fallen women', only to uncover something much more terrifying. Horror, starring Lalor Roddy, Ciaran Flynn and Helena Bereen

programme.title: Pyewacket (2017)
programme.desc: An angst-ridden teenage girl awakens something in the woods when she naively performs an occult ritual to kill her mother. Horror, starring Nicole Munoz, Laurie Holden and Chloe Rose

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah & Mason's, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentine's Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which Jo Frost offers child-rearing advice to parents. In the opening edition, she helps working parents Jessica and CJ Braido, who feel they're being overrun by their four small children, and struggle to agree on what parenting methods to adopt

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmin's dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Tristan struggles as Verity and Charlie continue to grow closer, while back in Chelsea, Zara reveals a secret that shatters Sam's world

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present the halfway point of the culinary contest, with pastry week. The bakers must put their own stamp on a Cornish classic and are set a retro technical challenge. For the showstopper round, they must concoct a classic tart in a pastry cage, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood decide who will be this week's star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets more tricky, puzzling and downright idiotic challenges for the celebrities, before Greg Davies decides who deserves the most points. Highlights include Johnny Vegas yelling from a tall chair, Katherine Parkinson forgetting how balloons work and Richard Herring flailing about in a dinghy. It remains to be seen what Daisy May Cooper and Mawaan Rizan will be doing - but it's unlikely to be dignified

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Devious Greg Davies tries to spot our five camouflaged comics, before the gang attempt to herd some dogs and chickens

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to comics including Mel Giedroyc and Noel Fielding, with Alex Horne and Noel Fielding dancing like a pair of shrews

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics returns, as the show's regular gaggle of families, friends and viewing party acquaintances settle down to share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques on what they have been watching during the week from the comfort of their own sofas. In this episode they appraise The Greatest Dancer, Small Fortune, Cold Feet, Famous and Fighting Crime, The Making of Me and the news

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share more of their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including This Morning, The Chase Celebrity Special, Baptiste, The Sex Clinic and Child Genius. Narrated by Craig Cash. First aired in March 2019

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Laboratory engineer Daniel, 39, attempts to keep his nerves under control when he meets 29-year-old lingerie designer Lauren, while six foot three firefighter Nikki hopes rugby player Ross will sweep her off her feet. Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: French-born Gladys comes from a family of aristocrats and is searching for her perfect English gentleman to take home to visit the castle. Will Accountant and ballroom dancing enthusiast Robert sweep her off her feet? Used-car salesman Joey meets fashion blogger Jodie, and a chance encounter the night before their date provides an initial spark

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmin's dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Robin start having casual sex, so Barney tries to resolve their domestic issues to stop them sleeping together. Meanwhile, Marshall begins to feel uncomfortable about using the toilet at work. Starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily's journey home after a trip to Seattle is disrupted by a blizzard, which threatens to interfere with her routine of meeting Marshall at airports after work trips. Elsewhere, Ted and Barney offer to watch the bar at MacLaren's while they wait for their dates. Starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. The McQueens pull together to guard their secrets. Meanwhile, Victor wants Juliet to recruit some new dealers and sets his sights on little Ella

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: To celebrate 25 years of the soap, five past and present cast members take it in turns to throw a dinner party, beginning with Gary Lucy hosting Ruby O'Donnell, Rishi Nair, Jorgie Porter and Jeremy Edwards

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jorgie Porter hosts the second dinner party, arranging a living room block party inspired by 1990s hip hop and RnB, serving up a menu of cordon bleu beans on toast

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rishi Nair (Sami Maalik) hopes that hosting on the Hollyoaks set will help him bag the £1,000 charity prize, and his night gets off to a great start with impressive arrival drinks

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: One-time series heart-throb Jeremy Edwards, otherwise known as Kurt Benson, provides a menu of home-made sushi, monkfish curry and a big, bold, brash birthday cake. But will a night of fine dining and all things Hollyoaks be enough to see him win the £1,000 for charity?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willy's Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of competition in and around Brighton, sees 50-year-old 'love doctor' Monti try to cast his spell over his guests in an attempt to win the £1000 cash prize. While Monti tries to spread the love, Tim really puts his foot in it as his compliment to Hannah gets well and truly lost in translation

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. In the second episode, Jimmy and the team deal with the arrival of 6000 Christmas turkeys. With the help of modern technology, Jimmy discovers what wild animals have been living in his woodlands. Plus, a wallaby is in urgent need of medical attention

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, Humberside Search and Rescue Team help a woman who's fallen on the cliffside while she was out walking her dog. In the Lake District, Keswick Mountain Rescue Team rush to Trish, who is unable to cope after she tripped on the fells. And in Newquay, the Rescue 924 team search for a light aircraft after reports that it's crashed into water

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Liam, 31, is rushed to St George's after collapsing at home after his fourth epileptic seizure of the day, and he experiences another at the hospital, while 89-year-old Mair is brought to A&E with severe chest pain and difficulty breathing and doctors take blood samples to test whether her symptoms are due to pneumonia. Twelve-year-old Lauren arrives by ambulance after breaking her leg while scoring a try in a rugby match and she needs extensive surgery to give her the best chance of walking normally again

programme.title: Inside James's
programme.desc: The documentary looks at the case of Mary Mooney from Co Wicklow, a woman with a rare form of blood cancer. Plus, a man whose right leg was amputated due to bloodflow complications

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, Humberside Search and Rescue Team help a woman who's fallen on the cliffside while she was out walking her dog. In the Lake District, Keswick Mountain Rescue Team rush to Trish, who is unable to cope after she tripped on the fells. And in Newquay, the Rescue 924 team search for a light aircraft after reports that it's crashed into water

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A five-year-old Great Dane is rushed to Fitzpatrick Referrals after losing the use of its back legs due to a slipped disc, with complications leaving the dog fighting for its life. A woman and her two children bring their pet spaniel to the practice after it is hit by a car, and a 10-year-old collie with hip dysplasia visits the surgery

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt aims to solve the age-old mystery of how to smoothly extract ketchup from a bottle - by running across a pond of custard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps house-hunters Taz and Tracy from London, who are looking for a property on Cyprus for £70,000 or less

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien hope a clay pigeon trap, a searchlight and a Peugeot 205 will help make a profit for their owners

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items 'lost' in people's homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: It's springtime at the chateau, and with the wedding season just a few weeks away, completing phase two of the basement project is becoming an urgent priority for Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree. To cater for all their summer guests, a much-needed utility and laundry room is about to be plumbed in. Angel comes up with a unique way of preserving the 150-year-old wallpaper, while Dick wrestles with a rake while working on the meadow

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps mother and daughter Tracy and Mimi design and build a new home on the Isle of Wight. The pair want to create a stylish contemporary house, but 11-year-old Mimi could be Charlie's toughest client yet. The budget is under pressure from day one, and as they battle towards completion disaster strikes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Wharfe House in Wetherby, run by B&B newcomer Pauline Cox, who's joined by her best friend Claire Smith. Eyebrows are raised when Mike and Karen Hepker arrive from Bath Lodge Castle in a chauffeur-driven car. During a visit to a local vineyard, sparks fly between Mike Hepker and Tash Thorne, who runs The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport with her partner Mike Pearce. Having only just opened, Pauline has a house full for the very first time. The narrow antique beds cause concerns and Jenny and Clive Aylett from Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk are first to criticise breakfast. When it comes to feedback, Pauline's left deflated by her sausage scores - and Karen and Mike Hepker vote with their feet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners visit Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk, run by husband-and-wife duo Clive and Jenny Aylett, but when the pair's rivals arrive, Pauline Cox and Claire Smith have difficulty locating their favourite appliance. Publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne are astonished to discover they cannot lock their room's door. In the morning, some of the guest make awkward requests to change their breakfast orders, causing professional chef Clive to experience a meltdown in the kitchen that leads to a fundamental error

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Bath Lodge Castle in Somerset for the third day of the competition, where they are wowed by Karen and Mike Hepker's luxury castle experience. Although the guests are disappointed at the bathroom fixtures and fittings, they are given the chance to vent their emotions during an afternoon of painting in the castle grounds. Plus, tensions rise between Mike and Tash at dinner, and harsh comments at feedback lead the hosts to suspect game playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport, Hampshire, run by publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne. Karen Hepker is disappointed with the honeymoon suite, while Clive and Jenny Aylett find a dubious looking splash guard in the shower. A boat tour backfires when Jenny struggles with her water phobia and at dinner Karen takes the opportunity to tell the others exactly what she thinks of them. But things really kick off when it comes to feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wharfe House hosts Pauline Cox and Claire Smith begin a bitter debate, demanding to know why their beds caused such a sleepless night. Accusations subsequently fly in all directions and walk-outs look on the cards as tensions mount leading to the payments being revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Stomp, a 13-year-old male okapi, is being encouraged to mate with younger female K'Tusha. But on his first attempt, he snaps his horn and causes K'Tusha a minor injury. Cameras at Chester Zoo also follow African painted dogs as they compete to be pack leader, and Raja the Bornean river turtle meets two prospective mates

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The start of the wedding season sees Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree at their busiest, with events booked all through the summer, but there is still time to make improvements. Angel has her sights set on transforming the gravelled area at the front of the chateau into a thing of beauty and the whole family take a trip to Monet's stunning house and garden, where a plan for the chateau's very own water lily patch is hatched

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Architect Tim Hill and his partner Ambi live decide to upsize from his award-winning but tiny home in Melbourne known as the Kensington Lighthouse, to something more adventurous on a corner block in Kensington. Their new property will be curvaceously shaped like a foot thanks to council regulations stipulating they must be a certain distance from the neighbours

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of self-made property developer Barry Surtees and his wife Julie as they try to build a four-storey mansion in Brighton, complete with pool, gym, artist's studio, fantasy bedroom and Japanese roof garden. The project is not without its difficulties as the cost of materials escalates, neighbours become unhappy about the house dwarfing the rest of the street, and Barry undergoes triple heart-bypass surgery

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Peter Monk heads to Gloucestershire to put the newly restored Merlin engine through its paces, while pilot Jez explores the history of the Spitfire as a reconnaissance aircraft

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at more green and hyper-efficient factories, looking at Rolls Royce's jet engines, GZ Vinyl's records, Yamaha Motors' motorbikes and Jelly Belly's jelly beans

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Seventy-one-year-old Tony is rushed to A&E by air ambulance after falling head first onto a tiled floor while doing DIY in his kitchen. Meanwhile, 23-year-old Charlie's facial injuries are treated after he was assaulted on his way home from a night out. A 10-year-old girl, Lucy, arrives at St George's after having seizures for the past 48 hours

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Rob Beckett to go up against Jon Richardson and Cariad Lloyd in the comedy words-and-numbers quiz. Jamie Laing joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Peter Monk heads to Gloucestershire to put the newly restored Merlin engine through its paces, while pilot Jez explores the history of the Spitfire as a reconnaissance aircraft

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick tends to a Newfoundland called Billy, who clocks up thousands of miles travelling back and forth from his home in Aberdeen for treatment on its legs. He also attempts to help Barney, a Yorkshire terrier that has a deformity in its neck that is compressing its spinal cord. For owners Linda and Barry, Noel is their last chance, but the operation involves high-risk surgery with no guarantee of success

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Italy to assess why Parmesan costs up to twice as much as supermarket cheddar and Kate Quilton travels to Hungary and Spain to find out exactly where paprika comes from. Plus, Matt Tebbutt looks at the best and quickest ways to remove the shell from a hard-boiled egg

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Dave's caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neil's christening. The event means a big reunion for the gang, at which Smithy receives surprising news from Nessa, and Stacey has a special request for her husband

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessa's plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Bryn is in his element as he awaits the arrival of the Essex boys, who are having a big night out in Cardiff and staying for a sleepover, but Smithy is concerned about seeing Nessa again after their last meeting. Meanwhile, Stacey tells Gavin about a worrying discovery, and Pam and Mick discuss their plans for a new conservatory

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Everyone gathers in Billericay as Pete and Dawn prepare to renew their wedding vows. Gavin feels uncomfortable about Gwen and Bryn knowing the details of his sex life, and Dave hears about the shocking events of the curry night. Meanwhile, Smithy goes beyond the call of friendship when he makes a staggering suggestion

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Bank Holiday Monday sees the Essex contingent arrive for a sunny day at the beach in Barry. Gavin has a heart-to-heart with his dad, which gives him much to think about, while a dark cloud looms on the horizon when Dave arrives to find Nessa and Smithy enjoying all the fun of the fair. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden and Ruth Jones star

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Preparations for Nessa and Dave's wedding are in full swing, Stacey has life-changing news for Gavin, and Bryn and Jason put their big secret to bed once and for all. Finally, the wedding arrives and, as Nessa prepares to make her way to the church, Smithy takes the opportunity to have one last chat. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden, Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon star

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Seven years into their marriage, Lee and Lucy face the daily onslaught of raising Charlie and his twin siblings, five-year-olds Benji and Molly. Lovably feckless father Frank remains around and close friends including world-weary Toby and uptight ice-queen Anna are still on the scene. Thankfully, Lucy's more dependable parents Geoffrey and Wendy can be relied upon when the going gets tough. However, while juggling the ongoing needs of those around him, the pair disagree about the best way to keep the romance alive. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy offends father-in-law Frank by casting doubt on his ability to mind the children while she and Lee enjoy an evening out at the ballet. Sally Bretton co-stars, alongside veteran comedy performer Bobby Ball and Outnumbered's Hugh Dennis

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee, Lucy and the children set off in their car to catch a ferry with plenty of time to spare - or so they think. As a consequence their plans for a welcome break prove anything but stress-free. Rob Brydon guest stars, with Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code (2006)
programme.desc: A respected academic goes on the run when he is framed for the murder of a French historian. Pursued by the detective on the case and a sinister assassin monk, he strives to unmask the culprit, leading to a conspiracy determined to preserve a 2,000-year-old secret at any cost. Thriller based on Dan Brown's novel, starring Tom Hanks, Audrey Tautou, Ian McKellen, Paul Bettany and Jean Reno

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Actor David Tennant takes over the reins for extended edition of the satirical quiz from April 2019, with Conservative MP Johnny Mercer and comedian Zoe Lyons joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the stories making the headlines

programme.title: QI

programme.title: Jon Richardson: Ultimate Worrier
programme.desc: Jon and guests Richard Osman, Jessie Cave and Darren Harriott discuss, categorise and rank worries to do with Modern Living. Has inventing got out of hand? Is magic dead?

programme.desc: Richard Hammond tests Volkswagen's Touareg off-roader, before driving a racing version of the car against a group of snowmobile riders in Sweden. programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: TV presenter Claudia Winkleman, broadcaster Clive Anderson, comedian Jason Manford and comedienne Miranda Hart join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show, in which they try to dupe their opponents with plausible lies about themselves. Presented by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are challenged to build a bridge over the River Kwai in Thailand. In order to do that, however, they have to drive across Burma, a country that has been largely closed to Westerners for more than 40 years, and must make the trip in three lorries, each bought sight unseen from the internet on a limited budget. What follows is an epic journey of beautiful scenery, regular adversity, ongoing malfunction and the constant bickering of the three men

programme.title: Groundhog Day (1993)
programme.desc: An obnoxious TV weatherman reporting on a small town's annual festival finds himself caught in a bizarre time loop, and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. While at first he tries to exploit his predicament, he is ultimately driven to mend his ways and adopt a less cynical attitude. Comedy, starring Bill Murray, Andie MacDowell, Chris Elliott and Stephen Tobolowsky

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: In the company of comedian Rob Delaney, Richard Ayoade packs his carry-on case and sets off to enjoy an optimal two-day mini city break in Seville, southern Spain. On arrival, the duo soon learn to dance flamenco and eat tapas and churros. They also explore Metropol Parasol, one of the boldest pieces of modern architecture in Europe and visit a film set built for the spaghetti western A Fistful of Dollars. After seeking to channel their inner Eastwood, the amigos repair to the saloon for some Fanta and a Kinder egg

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Jo Brand for a two-day spell in the Italian city. The pair stay at the famous Hotel Danieli, formerly the lodgings of Lord Byron, Charles Dickens and Indiana Jones, and in almost no time learn to row a gondola, take in the famous sights, sample the Venetian version of tapas, and explore the world of masks. They also road-test Whaiwhai - a book used with a map and mobile that takes people on a treasure hunt around the city - only without the treasure

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Extended compilation of the popular news quiz that looks back at the big news of 2019. With team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop, and a variety of guest hosts and panellists

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Guests Phill Jupitus, Holly Walsh and Nish Kumar join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme 'nonsense' in an extended episode. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: An evening of stand-up at the Apollo in Hammersmith, London. Jack Whitehall is the man in charge, treating the audience to his own brand of humour, before introducing routines by Canadian comedienne Katherine Ryan and American jokester Rich Hall

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: Offbeat tourism show in which Richard Ayoade is joined by celebrity guests to enjoy the most efficient weekend break possible. The pair sample adventurous cuisine, including potatoes coated in edible clay, and a cava tasting session quickly descends into disarray. Other highlights include a visit to the Barcelona Football Club museum, a guided tricycle tour, and a trip to see the surrealist work of Catalan artist Joan Miro

Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts a festive edition of the panel game, joined by regular panellist Alan Davies and guests Johnny Vegas, Sara Pascoe and Josh Widdicombe. Among the topics discussed are the aquatic equivalent of a sheepdog, why ice is slippery, and how big Dumbo's ears would have to be in order to fly. Plus, Sara reveals how her mother ruined the show for everyone and Alan achieves something he has wanted to do since QI first began

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

The Great British Bake Off judge then digs deeper, learning about his Scottish ancestry - and how one of his forebears held down a very demanding job

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. As she researches her paternal great-aunts Jadwiga and Michaela, she soon finds out more about their experiences under Nazi occupation. The search takes her to Warsaw and France, uncovering stories of life in a ghetto and a terrifying flight to Switzerland from the Germans

programme.title: Top of the Pops

programme.title: Steam Train Britain

programme.title: Steam Train Britain

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Great Central Railway's Scott Manley takes a rainy busman's holiday working as a guard at Bury, while a team of volunteers in Wales try to keep the line clear of overgrown plants

programme.title: Atlantic: The Wildest Ocean on Earth
programme.desc: Cillian Murphy narrates a documentary examining the lives of animals and people pitting themselves against the world's wildest ocean, unveiling the natural forces that underpin life in the Atlantic, from the world's most powerful currents, ferocious hurricanes and huge chains of undersea volcanoes. The first episode looks at the influence of the Gulf Stream, with whales, giant turtles and jellyfish riding the huge current that becomes a migration super-highway and helps warm northern Europe, while fishermen battle for survival in mountainous seas as they try to exploit its natural fertility

programme.title: Atlantic: The Wildest Ocean on Earth
programme.desc: Documentary examining the animals pitting themselves against the world's wildest ocean, unveiling the natural forces that underpin life in the Atlantic. In the vast South Atlantic, huge pods of dolphins, massive penguin colonies and the largest gathering of marine mammals on Earth pack chains of extraordinary islands, created by powerful volcanic forces far below them. Meanwhile, the nutrient-rich upwellings create profusions of life in some areas, and the abyssal depths host a world of bizarre creatures in others

programme.title: Atlantic: The Wildest Ocean on Earth
programme.desc: Life in the tropical Atlantic, where everything from dolphins, manatees and whale sharks to sunbathing jellyfish thrive in the Caribbean's warm, sheltered waters, fringed by coral reefs and rich mangrove forests. But when extreme heat in Africa unleashes terrifying hurricanes, all hell breaks loose across the region

programme.desc: Elizabeth is dead and James VI of Scotland travels south to take the throne at the invitation of Robert Cecil, but the new king has his own ideas and has little time for the late queen's spymaster. Soon Cecil's problems worsen when learns that his arch enemy John Gerard has escaped detention and made contact with a splinter cell in the Catholic underground with a plan to blow-up Parliament. Cecil must negotiate between warring factions to bring down what would become known as the Gunpowder Plot

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actor and stage director Derek Jacobi enjoyed a relatively humble upbringing in Leytonstone, London, where his father ran a sweet shop and his mother worked in a drapery, but research into his maternal side of the family soon uncovers a link to a far more intriguing past. Discovering that his great-grandmother's name was Salome Laplain, Jacobi finds that he is descended from a wealthy French Huguenot who fled religious persecution, and who has connections to royalty on this side of the channel

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Jerry Hall sets out to discover how her father's family, who she knew were originally from Oldham, ended up in the United States, and her investigation takes her from the cotton mills of Lancashire to the plains of Texas at the time of the railroad. She also explores her mother's side of the family and discovers her ancestors' pioneering roots as they headed west across the United States at the time of the Frontier, and finds out about a connection to the original pioneer and American folk hero, Daniel Boone

programme.title: Adolf Hitler's War
programme.desc: In Kursk, a 'battlefield' the size of Wales, the tide turns, and the Soviet's push back, but as Germany retreats, they destroy all evidence of their genocidal activities

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores an Edwardian utopia in Letchworth, where he meets a fourth generation citizen who introduces him to the town's community spirit. He then heads towards London, and discovers a favoured haunt of King Edward VII, before sampling the monarch's favourite tipple, the King's Ginger

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Croydon, where he hears the story of a mixed-race composer who was once celebrated but is now forgotten. At the Three Bridges station, he is delighted to find a recently built depot and its fleet of new Class 700 trains - and is given the great honour of washing one down. In Lewes, he makes a beeline for Charleston, the home of artists Vanessa Bell and Duncan Grant, and in Shoreham-by-Sea, Michael discovers how magnificent Edwardians in flying machines took off from the oldest licensed airport in the country

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Bolsover Castle in Derbyshire. Finds on display include original illustrations for Roald Dahl's book Fantastic Mr Fox, a set of motorcyclist Barry Sheene's racing leathers, a collection of Star Wars toys, a mysterious metal rod that proves to be far more valuable than it appears and a miniature house used for training plumbers. A visitor to the show tries to find a glass figure for her mother, to replace one that exploded

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo heads to Chichester, West Sussex, where he encounters an Edwardian motoring duo patronised by King Edward VII. After a grand tour of their factory, he is treated to some rest and relaxation in one of their finest vehicles. Arriving in the resort of Southsea, Hampshire, Michael heads for the King's Theatre, where he treads the boards in a community production of Lads in the Village. Crossing the Solent, the presenter boards the Island Line to travel along the pier in a 1930s London Underground carriage, then hops on to the Isle of Wight heritage line bound for Wootton

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Dorset, Michael Portillo visits Brownsea Island, where Robert Baden Powell began the scout movement in the early 20th century. Joining a group of present scouts, the presenter learns to build a bivouac and finds out what it is about scouting that still appeals to boys - and girls - today. In the New Forest, Michael searches out some unsung heroes of the First World War - the ponies who became war horses - and hears their story from a commoner who runs a stable and riding school. programme.title: Scrap Kings

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: A new summer mining season begins, but gold in Nome seems to be drying up, pushing the miners to new extremes in their search for a rich vein

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How skyline logging sources Vancouver's most elusive trees. Plus, how ordinary clay is transformed into intricate tiles in a Spanish workshop

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Single mother Siobhan Parkinson hosts the first dinner party of the week in Merseyside. Her guests are electrician Justin Sumner, hospitality assistant Lin Rearden, fitness instructor Jean-Jacques Silitto and student Ashley Burke, and she plans to win them over with a homely menu including chicken liver pate and slow-cooked lamb. Her efforts in the kitchen, however, are soon forgotten as insults start to fly with the arrival of her diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ashley Burke hosts the second party in Mersey, bringing the diners to the home she shares with her mother, who has made herself scarce for the evening. Preparing for the event causes the hostess's enthusiasm to quickly wane, but she hopes her lack of experience in the kitchen will be ignored when she invites her fellow competitors to enjoy her oxygen bar

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Jean-Jacques Silitto hosts the latest dinner party in Mersey. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Electrician Justin Sumner hosts the penultimate dinner party in Mersey and is determined to impress his guests by creating a Chinese-themed menu from scratch. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hospitality assistant Lin Rearden hosts the final dinner party in Mersey, and hopes to impress with her organisational skills and two surprise desserts. However, she has to keep an eye on the younger guests' behaviour throughout the evening, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Head teacher Corinna hosts the first of five parties in and around Essex, hoping her royal-themed evening will impress her guests Paul, Grace, Harmy and Adam

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Harmy hosts the third night of the competition in and around Essex, hoping to impress her guests by serving up an authentic Punjabi feast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant Adam is the fourth to host in and around Essex, and hopes to exceed expectations with a menu of posh nosh at his dad's house

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The last to act as host is 24-year-old recruitment consultant Grace, who hopes to dazzle her guests with a glamorous party, Essex-style. With a menu full of home-made grub and help from her family along the way, it remains to be seen whether Grace has done enough to bag the £1,000

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner, who is nearly $1million in debt. Gordon is dismayed to discover unprotected meat and fish left next to mouldy pesto jars in the kitchen and plans to close down the eatery until radical changes are made

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present the halfway point of the culinary contest, with pastry week. The bakers must put their own stamp on a Cornish classic and are set a retro technical challenge. For the showstopper round, they must concoct a classic tart in a pastry cage, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood decide who will be this week's star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe are among the famous faces hitting the couch, joining Britain's favourite opinionated viewers as part of this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Also taking part are Line of Duty's Adrian Dunbar, Vicky McClure and Martin Compston, and KSI and Craig David. Shows they are appraising include Simply Nigella, Five Guys a Week, The Andrew Marr Show interview with Michael Gove, Family Fortunes, Scream, The Million Pound Cube, Emily's Story: Stand Up to Cancer, and news coverage of Manchaster mayor Andy Burnham's skirmish with the Government

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: An edition focusing on the behaviour of teenage boys, with frontline staff in Northamptonshire and across the country saying they are becoming more violent. PC Kathleen Roberts responds to a suspected acid attack carried out by a teenager in Northampton, while Sgt Martin Waller is dispatched to the scene of a suspected gang-related stabbing

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. In the second episode, Jimmy and the team deal with the arrival of 6000 Christmas turkeys. With the help of modern technology, Jimmy discovers what wild animals have been living in his woodlands. Plus, a wallaby is in urgent need of medical attention

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by series fans Joel Dommett and Vick Hope, as they tuck into the best bits and unseen extras from Pastry Week. Plus, exclusive unseen clips from the tent and an interview with the latest baker to leave the competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chip shop manager Martyn Bilby throws the second dinner party in Doncaster, and pulls out all the stops with his signature dish - a chocolate eclair swan on a blue jelly lake. The guests are asked to dress formally for the occasion, but two competitors struggle to maintain their dignity when they catch sight of an embarrassing photograph of the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner-party challenge from Doncaster is hosted by trading standards manager Tracey Hewer. She hopes to win her guests over with a barrage of cupcakes, but the diners soon spot that her efforts have focused more on presentation than the taste of the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lecturer Signe Jase hosts the penultimate dinner party in Doncaster, preparing an adventurous menu of Latvian delicacies including herring salad and salted salmon. However, fussy eater Tracey refuses to try much of the food, which leaves Martyn unimpressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amusement arcade supplier Barry Hill hosts the final dinner party in Doncaster, and hopes to impress his guests with a magic act, a celebrity butler and a dip in his pool, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby enthusiast Andy and dental nurse Holly kick off the competition in Yorkshire with a Mexican fiesta - a fun-filled evening, but with a few blunders in the kitchen. Day two sees married couple Mitesh and Jess cooking up an Indian-inspired meal, but with a couple of spice-fearing guests, they have a tough crowd to please. Finally, it's the turn of Yorkshire couple Paul and Mandy to host with some 'proper grub'. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away

Kathy loves the wild shores of Pembrokeshire in west Wales, while Gerry is inspired by the crystal waters of the Greek island of Zakynthos. Going head to head to find them their dream property is Jasmine Harman in the UK and Jonnie Irwin in Greece. Each has a £200,000 budget to play with and three amazing options to line up

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children flying the nest, Andy and Alida have decided now is the time to fulfil their dream of buying a chalet in the French Alps. They are downsizing their house in Wokingham, Surrey, and splitting the funds between the UK and France, so Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin have been sent on a joint mission. With a total of £650,000 to spend, and three shots each to find the perfect property - Laura in Berkshire and Jonnie in the ski-resort of Morzine - the pressure is really on for both of them to deliver

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton and Jasmine Harman help Bob and Judith choose between the rugged coastline of northern Norfolk and the sunny beaches of the Costa Blanca on a budget of £230,000

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Crime drama, with Peter Falk and William Shatner

programme.title: Columbo: Lady in Waiting (1971)
programme.desc: A desperate woman is determined to rid herself of her domineering brother and gain control of the family business, so hatches a plan to shoot him and claim she thought he was a burglar. Although her plan seems to have worked, her new-found power goes to her head - and she also has to contend with Columbo, who is convinced of her guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leslie Nielsen and Susan Clark

programme.title: Columbo: Lovely but Lethal (1973)
programme.desc: A cosmetics company is rocked by the revelation that a pirated version of their latest product is on the market, and then, shortly afterwards, one of their chemists is found murdered. But when the shabby sleuth scrutinises the case, he suspects the events are linked to a rival company. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Vincent Price, Martin Sheen and Vera Miles

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the murder of an undertaker leads them to discover a field of decomposed corpses. The detectives soon turn their attentions to the owner of a nearby crematorium and his shady relationship with a contract killer. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former footballer is caught abusing his ex-girlfriend in leaked surveillance camera footage, and Fin and Benson investigate the couple's history. The pair - sportscaster AJ Martin and partner Paula - struggle to keep their family and relationship intact in the wake of the video's appearance

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins makes a connection between a series of sexual assaults on young girls that have recently taken place, and some cases she worked on while back in Atlanta, but making a concrete link between the incidents proves difficult. Hard-hitting series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A single mother faces charges of child neglect after her six-year-old daughter is discovered home alone. However, Benson suspects there is more to her story and his investigations reveal she not only suffered sexual abuse as a child but also featured in scores of images and videos popular with online paedophiles - forcing the woman to face up to her past. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is assigned round-the-clock security when sadistic killer William Lewis makes contact with her after escaping from his hospital prison guard. After murdering his doctor, he abducts and threatens to kill the woman's daughter unless Benson admits she lied during his trial - a confession that leads her to an abandoned granary, where the killer indulges in a devastating game of Russian roulette. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Pablo Schreiber

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs throws himself back into his work following his near-death experience, updating his appearance and tackling a new risky case alongside DEA agent Luis Mitchell, who wants help bringing down a drugs cartel. Concerned about his colleague's apparent enthusiasm to re-enter the field, DiNozzo discovers Mitchell is the son of a former NCIS agent who gave his life trying to save Gibbs' late wife and daughter, and this attachment is causing Gibbs to break his own rule against personal involvement in a case. However, a significant danger is posed by Benson Long, the cartel's head, and Mitchell's top target

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine is found murdered in Quantico, mere hours after calling Gibbs to discuss a possible case. In response, Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to run surveillance on a lieutenant and his wife, who may be connected to the death. Starring Mark Harmon, Emily Wickersham and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Rookie Blue
