programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the murder of a grief counsellor who claimed he could communicate with the dead, and discover he was a conman with a host of disgruntled clients, any one of whom might have had a motive for killing him. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sweatshop boss is killed in what initially appears to be a violent but fairly routine crime prompted by a workplace affair. Briscoe and Green begin their investigation by working on the assumption that they are looking for a wronged partner with a grievance - but inquiries gradually lead them to an illegal immigrant who claims the dead man had coerced his partner into acting as a surrogate mother

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Palmer faces a dilemma during a hit-and-run investigation when he spots a stranger standing on a ledge, and places his own life in peril in an attempt to get the man down to safety

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer in a small town outside Washington, D.C, prompts the team to once again partner with The Sherlocks, a privately funded investigative team that includes their newest member, Anthony DiNozzo Sr. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Abby's homeland security think-tank is compromised when its leader is found to have been murdered, and a theoretical guide to how to pull off a terror attack is stolen

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Bishop is more determined than ever to seek revenge for the murder of Qasim, her deceased boyfriend, after Gibbs and the team find a new lead in the Chen case. Meanwhile, Torres teaches the agents the art of pickpocketing

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee discovers his flat has been torn apart by a robber trying to locate an item of great value hidden somewhere by the convicted criminal who previously owned the unit. Meanwhile, congress woman Flemming tries to persuade Director Vance to pursue a career in politics. Mary Stuart Masterson guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Detective drama chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson investigates when a girl is invited to meet her celebrity crush, and is later found assaulted in an alley - and the star becomes the main suspect in the case. Hard-hitting series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sergeant Benson is rescued by the squad following William Lewis's death. However, her strife continues when her actions are investigated by the Internal Affairs department, and head prosecutor Derek Strauss calls for her arrest. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Murphy question a television producer when he is accused of molesting his daughter. His estranged wife wants justice for her child, but her failure to cooperate leads the detectives to suspect the accusation was a spiteful ploy. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Donal Logue

programme.title: NCIS

Starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll

programme.desc: The DIY SOS team are out of their comfort zone this week, joining forces with two world-famous institutions - Great Ormond Street Hospital and the Chelsea Flower Show - for a special challenge. Gardener Chris Beardshaw has promised his gold medal-winning garden from the flower show to the hospital - now all Nick Knowles and his fellow builders have to do is crane the display across London and rebuild it on the hospital. It's a hugely ambitious build, with tricky logistics and emotional volunteers. But knowing how much the garden will prove welcome respite for families, the team is determined not to fail

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: DIY SOS highlights the plight of nation's 250,000 young carers, who look after their parents on a daily basis. Blackpool Carers Trust, which is supported by funding from Children in Need, provides limited out-of-school respite and training activities for some of these carers - but its current centre is bursting at the seams. It has now inherited a run-down property, which is bigger but will require the renovation of a neglected building and a huge overgrown garden - and that's where Nick and the team come in, with help from designer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen

programme.title: DIY SOS

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: In Bridlington, East Yorkshire, police officers have their hands full dealing with a rowdy drunk who has been involved in a disturbance with staff at a local nightclub. Meanwhile, in Hull, angling gear and alcohol are discovered stashed in park bushes, and the team suspects someone is planning to return later that night for a spot of illegal fishing

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Officers in Hull chase a drink-driver fleeing the wreckage of a van that has slammed into the lights at a pedestrian crossing. On an industrial estate in Grimsby, Lincolnchire, a youth escaping from the police falls through a factory roof and suffers a broken wrist, while two well-known tower blocks are razed to the ground to make way for the regeneration of a housing estate in Hull. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: The team joins forces with Trading Standards and HMRC to tackle rogue dealers who are selling fake and illegally imported cigarettes. programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: In March 2010, pub landlord Michael Tucker shot his partner Rebecca Thorpe in the head while she was having a bath and hid her body in a chest freezer in one of the outbuildings of his bar in Snettisham, Norfolk. This documentary analyses Tucker's emotional state of mind and the events that led him to kill in cold blood, and includes interviews with Rebecca's father Peter, Jes Fry of the Norfolk and Suffolk major investigation team and consultant forensic psychologist Kerry Daynes

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band gets trapped in the Bermuda Triangle while heading for Jamaica

programme.title: K3

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s takes a look at the origins of jazz and challenges the theories that it is a black music form which was created in New Orleans. Featuring contributions and footage from Miles Davis, Duke Ellington, Charlie Mingus and Louis Armstrong

programme.title: Mystery on Bird Island (1954)
programme.desc: Five youngsters living in the Channel Islands discover a plot to smuggle valuable birds' eggs out of the country. Children's adventure, starring Mavis Sage and Jennifer Beach

programme.title: The Captain's Table (1959)
programme.desc: A gruff cargo skipper is given the command of a luxurious liner, but finds it difficult to mind his manners among the upper-class passengers. Comedy, with John Gregson, Donald Sinden, Peggy Cummins and Reginald Beckwith

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring Wapping for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: Profile of the Gallagher brothers, who formed Oasis in the early 1990s and have gone on to sell more than 70 million albums

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old man receives a shock when consultant surgeon Shaw Somers reveals he is suffering from metabolic syndrome and his body is more like that of a 60-year-old. A 23-year-old woman seeks help with her extremely bad breath, GP Giovanni Miletto puts together an experimental plan to combat chronic fatigue syndrome, and Pixie McKenna discovers how diet can influence people's chances of developing cancer

programme.title: Iranian Embassy Siege
programme.desc: Interviews with those involved in the 1980 Iranian Embassy Siege and footage of the dramatic SAS operation that brought it to an end

programme.title: K-Shop (2016)
programme.desc: A Bournemouth takeaway owner despairs of his drunken, abusive customers and is finally pushed to the limit when his father is killed in a violent altercation. He begins murdering the people who make his life a misery, and disposes of the bodies by making them into kebabs. Horror, starring Reece Noi and Ewen MacIntosh

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Comedy set in a DIY shop where the customer is always wrong. Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz star

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.desc: A retrospective review of Bowie's classic album, featuring extensive interviews with Woody Woodmansey and the late Trevor Bolder

programme.title: The Returned (2013)
programme.desc: A young doctor goes on the run with her bitten boyfriend and their remaining supplies of a protein used to treat a zombie virus. Sci-fi horror, starring Emily Hampshire, Kris Holden-Ried and Shawn Doyle

programme.title: IRF Rafting World Championships
programme.desc: Over 300 of the world's best white water rafters travelled to the Cassowary Coast for a chance to become the ' best of the best' in the International Rafting Federation's premier event of 2019

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash gets some time off and plans to spend it in bed - but Susan has other ideas

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: The team deals with a bomb at a gas works, only to discover another explosive device - which is set to go off at a specific time

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A new commanding officer pushes the team too hard, leaving the overworked team planning a revolt. Ash and Susan consider their future

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Susan decides to go back to her husband, while Ash gets some help from the Navy in learning hoe to dispose of new German land mines

programme.title: Danger UXB

programme.title: Friend or Foe (1982)
programme.desc: Two Second World War evacuees face a dilemma when they meet a German pilot who has been shot down. Family drama, starring John Bardon and Stacey Tendeter

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: Hell Is a City (1960)
programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.title: Opera Holland Park: Into the Light
programme.desc: Summer 2019 Opera Holland Park invited three UK ex-forces personnel suffering from PTSD & mental health issues to see a performance of Iolanta

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Poplar for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Shakespeare Myth Maker
programme.desc: A look into Shakespeare's world and the myths surrounding his works

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams travels to the Wiltshire village home of Jim Stoodley, who at the age of 14 stole a US aircraft and took to the air with the intention of killing Adolf Hitler - earning himself a place in the Guinness Book of Records as the youngest pilot in history

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams investigates the ration-book fraudsters and coupon fiddlers spawned by the restrictions of the Second World War, and looks at the career of gangster Frankie Fraser, for whom the war provided an opportunity to get rich quick

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Diana: Last Days of a Princess

Including interviews with Mohamed Al Fayed, bodyguard Kez Wingfield and masseuse Myriah Daniels

programme.title: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Part one of two. An alcoholic detective pursues the infamous serial killer brutally murdering prostitutes in Victorian London. Many potential suspects present themselves, from an anti-royal demagogue to an actor whose stage portrayal of murderous evil is a little too convincing, but the inspector is convinced a conspiracy seeks to protect the ripper's identity. Thriller, with Michael Caine, Jane Seymour, Lewis Collins and Harry Andrews

programme.title: Brimstone and Treacle (1982)
programme.desc: Asinister stranger worms his way into a middle-aged couple's home by offering to take care of their comatose daughter - but it is only once he's part of the family that his true nature shines through. Drama based on Dennis Potter's TV play, starring Sting, Denholm Elliott, Joan Plowright and Suzanna Hamilton

programme.title: Silent Scream (1990)
programme.desc: A former soldier is sentenced to life in prison after murdering a bartender in 1960s Soho. During his incarceration, his violent behaviour gets more and more out of control, until prison doctors assign him an experimental treatment to help him come to terms with the roots of his rage. Prison drama, starring Iain Glen and Robert Carlyle

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIII's second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Dallas Cowboys' 1993 Super Bowl triumph against Buffalo Bills at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. This match represented the first time in history that the same teams faced each other in the showpiece match in two consecutive years, while the Cowboys' 30-13 victory meant they tied the Pittsburgh Steelers and the San Francisco 49ers for most Super Bowl wins, as they claimed their fourth trophy
